questionHtml: On graph paper, draw a scatter diagram to show the results of Don’s investigation. Use a scale of 1 cm to represent 2 units on the x-axis, and 1 cm to represent 5 units on the y-axis.
markschemeHtml:
* This question is from an exam for a previous syllabus, and may contain minor differences in marking or structure.

       (A4)


Note: Award (A1) for correct scales and labels.
Award (A3) for all six points correctly plotted.
Award (A2) for four or five points correctly plotted.
Award (A1) for two or three points correctly plotted.
Award at most (A0)(A3) if axes reversed.
If graph paper is not used, award at most (A1)(A0)(A0)(A0).


[4 marks]

meta.title: On graph paper, draw a scatter diagram to show the results of Don’s investigation. Use a scale of 1 cm to represent 2 units on the x-axis, and 1 cm to represent 5 units on the y-ax
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.4—Pearsons, scatter diagrams, eqn of y on x
